issues.message: Use `exportâ¦from` to re-export `createImageFormData`.
Use the spread operator instead of '.apply()'.
Use the spread operator instead of '.apply()'.
'If' statement should not be the only statement in 'else' block
Use the spread operator instead of '.apply()'.
Prefer `Number.parseFloat` over `parseFloat`.
Prefer `Number.isNaN` over `isNaN`.
Prefer `Number.NaN` over `NaN`.
Prefer `Number.NaN` over `NaN`.
Prefer `String#replaceAll()` over `String#replace()`.
Prefer `String#replaceAll()` over `String#replace()`.
Prefer `String#replaceAll()` over `String#replace()`.
Group parts of the regex together to make the intended operator precedence explicit.
Prefer `String#replaceAll()` over `String#replace()`.
Unnecessary `.getTime()` call.
Avoid using `instanceof` for type checking as it can lead to unreliable results.
Use `forâ¦of` instead of `.forEach(â¦)`.
Use `forâ¦of` instead of `.forEach(â¦)`.
Remove this unused import of 'SELECTORS'.
